description: Human-reviewed direct dependency versions for the Python 3.14 production lane. Package metadata in pyproject.toml governs compatible ranges; the complete transitive release lock governs the accepted Windows environment.

production_python_3_14.test_result: 645 passed, 13 deselected in 69.89 s; pip check clean

minimum_supported_python_3_14.selection_basis: earliest reviewed binary-installable versions for standard CPython 3.14 within package metadata ranges
minimum_supported_python_3_14.local_resolution_result: non-editable package install and pip check passed

notes: Python 3.14 is the only supported runtime; Python 3.15 requires a new compatibility gate.
The standard GIL-enabled CPython ABI is required; the free-threaded ABI is not accepted.
MCP SDK 1.x remains the production line; 2.x requires a dedicated migration gate.
MPh 1.3.1 is calibrated for COMSOL Multiphysics 6.4.0.293.
Optional semantic dependencies are outside the default runtime release lock.
